info.title: Mulkchi API
info.description:
O'zbekiston ko'chmas mulk platformasi API

Mulkchi Real Estate Platform API for property listings, bookings, analytics, and user management.

**Features:**
- Property listings with advanced search
- User authentication with JWT tokens
- Booking management system
- Analytics and market insights
- Multi-language support (Uzbek, Russian, English)
- Rate limiting and security features

Bearer.description:
JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme.

Enter 'Bearer' [space] and then your token in the text input below.

Example: 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...'
